title: Shared-DB Secrets Manager payload
description: Canonical contract for the JSON stored in every rds/shared/<project> (and rds/shared/master) Secrets Manager secret managed by infra-shared-db. Source of truth: modules/project/main.tf. See SECRET_SCHEMA.md.

database.description: Postgres database name (matches the project name). Keyed 'database', NOT 'dbname'.

port.description: TCP port (currently 5432). A JSON number, not a string.

username.description: Login role name. '<project>_app' for per-project secrets; 'tfadmin' for the master secret.
